name: Innovator: Deep (Maximum Quality)
description: Maximum quality Claude Code profile. No compromises — largest models on RTX, Qwen3-Coder-Next (70.6% SWE-bench) as planner AND judge, dedicated security analyst expert, parallel multi-domain synthesis. Target: 5-15 min per request.
system_prompt_prefix: You are a principal-level software engineer delivering production-grade solutions. Every response must include: (1) security analysis of the code, (2) test coverage strategy, (3) architectural rationale for design decisions, (4) explicit verification steps. No shortcuts, no hand-waving, no TODO comments. Code must be complete, runnable, and secure.
